req.title: Export employee directory — variant 3
req.statement: An hr-admin shall export the employee directory as CSV with PII redacted for employees who opted out of public directory. Additionally, the action must emit a webhook event for external consumers.

# Pytest Tests for HR Admin Employee Directory CSV Export

```python
"""
Tests for HR Admin Employee Directory CSV Export with PII Redaction and Webhook Emission.

Requirement:
    An hr-admin shall export the employee directory as CSV with PII redacted
    for employees who opted out of public directory. Additionally, the action
    must emit a webhook event for external consumers.
"""

import csv
import io
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from unittest.mock import ANY, MagicMock, call, patch

import pytest

from myapp.exceptions import UnauthorizedError, ExportError
from myapp.models import Employee, ExportAuditLog
from myapp.services.directory_export import EmployeeDirectoryExportService
from myapp.services.webhook import WebhookService

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Constants / Shared test data
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

REDACTED = "[REDACTED]"

OPT_IN_EMPLOYEE = {
    "id": "emp-001",
    "name": "Alice Johnson",
    "email": "alice@example.com",
    "phone": "+1-555-100-0001",
    "department": "Engineering",
    "job_title": "Senior Engineer",
    "location": "New York",
    "opted_out_of_public_directory": False,
}

OPT_OUT_EMPLOYEE = {
    "id": "emp-002",
    "name": "Bob Smith",
    "email": "bob@example.com",
    "phone": "+1-555-100-0002",
    "department": "Finance",
    "job_title": "Analyst",
    "location": "Chicago",
    "opted_out_of_public_directory": True,
}

ANOTHER_OPT_IN_EMPLOYEE = {
    "id": "emp-003",
    "name": "Carol White",
    "email": "carol@example.com",
    "phone": "+1-555-100-0003",
    "department": "HR",
    "job_title": "HR Manager",
    "location": "Austin",
    "opted_out_of_public_directory": False,
}

PII_FIELDS = {"name", "email", "phone"}
NON_PII_FIELDS = {"id", "department", "job_title", "location"}


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ----------

telemetry.raw_response_head:
# Pytest Tests for HR Admin Employee Directory CSV Export

```python
"""
Tests for HR Admin Employee Directory CSV Export with PII Redaction and Webhook Emission.

Requirement:
    An hr-admin shall export the employee directory as CSV with PII redacted
    for employees who opted out of public directory. Additionally, the action
    must emit a webhook event for external consumers.
"""

import csv
import io
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from unittest.mock import ANY, MagicMock, call, patch

import pytest

from myapp.exceptions import UnauthorizedError, ExportError
from myapp.models import Employee, ExportAuditLog
from myapp.services.directory_export import EmployeeDirectoryExportService
from myapp.services.webhook import WebhookService

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Constants / Shared test data
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

REDACTED = "[REDACTED]"

OPT_IN_EMPLOYEE = {
    "id": "emp-001",
    "name": "Alice Johnson",
    "email": "alice@example.com",
    "phone": "+1-555-100-0001",
    "department": "Engineering",
    "job_title": "Senior Engineer",
    "location": "New York",
    "opted_out_of_public_directory": False,
}

OPT_OUT_EMPLOYEE = {
    "id": "emp-002",
    "name": "Bob Smith",
    "email": "bob@example.com",
    "phone": "+1-555-100-0002",
    "department": "Finance",
    "job_title": "Analyst",
    "location": "Chicago",
    "opted_out_of_public_directory": True,
}

ANOTHER_OPT_IN_EMPLOYEE = {
    "id": "emp-003",
    "name": "Carol White",
    "email": "carol@example.com",
    "phone": "+1-555-100-0003",
    "department": "HR",
    "job_title": "HR Manager",
    "location": "Austin",
    "opted_out_of_public_directory": False,
}

PII_FIELDS = {"name", "email", "phone"}
NON_PII_FIELDS = {"id", "department", "job_title", "location"}


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@pytest.fixture
def hr_admin_user():
    user = MagicMock()
    user.id = "user-hr-001"
    user.role = "hr-admin"
    user.is_authenticated = True
    return user


@pytest.fixture
def non_admin_user():
    user = MagicMock()
    user.id = "user-reg-001"
    user.role = "employee"
    user.is_authenticated = True
    return user


@pytest.fixture
def unauthenticated_user():
    user = MagicMock()
    user.id = None
    user.role = None
    user.is_authenticated = False
    return user


@pytest.fixture
def mock_employee_repo():
    repo = MagicMock()
    repo.get_all.return_value = [
        Employee(**OPT_IN_EMPLOYEE),
        Employee(**OPT_OUT_EMPLOYEE),
        Employee(**ANOTHER_OPT_IN_EMPLOYEE),
    ]
    return repo


@pytest.fixture
def mock_webhook_service():
    return MagicMock(spec=WebhookService)


@pytest.fixture
def mock_audit_log():
    return MagicMock(spec=ExportAuditLog)


@pytest.fixture
def export_service(mock_employee_repo, mock_webhook_service, mock_audit_log):
    return EmployeeDirectoryExportService(
        employee_repository=mock_employee_repo,
        webhook_service=mock_webhook_service,
        audit_log=mock_audit_log,
    )


@pytest.fixture
def csv_export_result(export_service, hr_admin_user):
    """Pre-computed CSV result for reuse across multiple tests."""
    return export_service.export_csv(requested_by=hr_admin_user)


def parse_csv(csv_content: str) -> list[dict]:
    reader = csv.DictReader(io.StringIO(csv_content))
    return list(reader)


# ===========================================================================
# 1. ACCESS CONTROL
# ===========================================================================


class TestAccessControl:
    """Only hr-admin users may trigger an export."""

    def test_hr_admin_can_export(self, export_service, hr_admin_user):
        result = export_service.export_csv(requested_by=hr_admin_user)
        assert result i
